title: Lennox International (LII) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Lennox International (LII) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.83 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.42 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.36 per share a year ago.

title: Got $1,000? 2 Wildly Undervalued Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever
text: Both Snap-on and Lennox have raised their dividends for 13 consecutive years. Each stock's dividend uses less than 35% of its net income.

title: Lennox International: A Solid Long-Term Holding At The Right Valuation
text: High inventory costs reduced operating cash flows in 2022. Lennox International may struggle to grow revenues in 2023, but cash flows should improve as it sells its inventory.
